Web Developer — Adelaide, SA

Building the web
for small business.

I design and build custom websites that help small businesses look professional, attract customers, and grow.

See my work → Start a project
01

Small business websites,
done properly.

I'm Alexandria - a web developer based in Adelaide, South Australia. I build custom websites for small businesses that want to look like they mean it online. Not a template, not a drag-and-drop builder, not a site that looks like everyone else's.

Every project starts with a real conversation. I find out what you do, who your customers are, and what you actually need the site to achieve. Then I build it from scratch, handle the tech, and hand you something you're proud to share.

I work with cafes, gyms, tradies, boutiques, and anyone else who needs a proper web presence but doesn't want to deal with a big agency or figure it all out themselves.

→ About me

03 / What I Do

Everything your business
needs online.

01

Website Design & Build

A complete custom website, designed and built around your business. From first conversation to launch day, I handle everything so you don't have to.

02

Custom Development

Need something specific that off-the-shelf tools can't handle? I build custom functionality to spec - booking flows, integrations, dynamic content and more.

03

Site Maintenance

Websites need care after launch. Monthly maintenance plans keep your site updated, secure, and running well. No more chasing someone for a content change.

04

Digital Setup & Tech

Domain, hosting, business email, Google Business Profile, analytics. I handle the full digital setup so your entire online presence actually works.

Ready to build something?

Let's talk about your project.
